ASR Outdoor Comprehensive Wilderness Travel Medicine Guide and Survival Tool

A Comprehensive Guide to Wilderness and Travel Medicine written by Eric A. Weiss M.D an invaluable book essential to any travelers's medical kit.

Key Features

  • ESSENTIAL MEDICAL GUIDE - Authored by Dr. Eric A. Weiss, this comprehensive book equips travelers, hikers, and outdoor enthusiasts with crucial knowledge for handling a wide range of medical situations in remote settings.
  • COVERS MINOR TO MAJOR EMERGENCIES - Learn how to treat everything from splinters and tick bites to life-threatening emergencies like heart attacks, gunshot wounds, and altitude sickness.
  • INDISPENSIBLE FOR WILDERNESS SURVIVAL - A must-have in every travel or first aid kit, this guide empowers users to confidently respond to medical crises far from professional care.
  • BONUS 11 IN 1 SURVIVAL TOOL INCLUDED - Comes with a durable, multipurpose pocket tool that includes a knife edge, can opener, screwdriver, ruler, wrench set, saw blade, and more.
  • COMPACT AND TRAVEL-READY - Both the guide and survival tool are designed for portability, making them perfect companions for backcountry adventures or international travel.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRSURV4232
  • UPC: 793564800734
  • Color: Multicolor

Great for treating anything from flesh wounds, tick bites, splinters, to more serious medical emergencies such as heart attacks, gun shots wounds, altitude illness, and so much more. This comprehensive guide is indispensable for hikers, travelers, backcountry enthusiast, or anyone else looking to increase their wilderness and travel medicine knowledge.

Included with the guide book is an eleven use survival tool. This multipurpose pocket survival tool is used for: 1. Can opener 2. Knife Edge 3. Screwdriver 4. Ruler 5. Cap Opener 6. 4 position Wrench (for various size nuts & bolt head) 7. Butterfly Wrench 8. Saw Blade 9. Direction Ancillary Indication 10. 2 Position Wrench 11. Lanyard Hole (key Ring Hole)
